prompt: Ultra realistic cinematic portrait of a fearless young adventure girl standing on the edge of a dramatic mountain cliff during golden hour. She has expressive eyes, naturally windswept long dark hair, glowing sun kissed skin, and a confident smile. She wears a rugged olive green hiking jacket over a fitted black performance shirt, cargo hiking pants, sturdy brown leather boots, fingerless gloves, and a weathered backpack with climbing rope, carabiners, and camping gear attached. One hand holds a trekking pole while the other rests on the backpack strap. Behind her, towering snow covered peaks, waterfalls, dense pine forests, mist drifting through the valley, and a crystal clear alpine lake create an epic landscape. Soft golden sunlight, realistic atmospheric haze, detailed fabric textures, natural skin pores, cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, dynamic composition, National Geographic style, ultra sharp focus, HDR photography, volumetric lighting, 8K, masterpiece, photorealistic, highly detailed, adventurous, inspiring, fearless explorer, premium travel magazine cover aesthetic.
